title: DA vote raises eyebrows
bodyText: [{"type":"blockquote","text":"When it came to voting on the referral of the complaint, three DA councillors broke ranks and voted against it."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Alleged financial misconduct","html":"Alleged financial misconduct"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Susan Campbell","html":"Susan Campbell "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Code of Conduct","html":"Code of Conduct"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Councillor Morton Gericke of the PBI left the meeting and logged on virtually, but was too late and missed the vote."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
